emotional_tone: Utilitarian, authoritative, and robust. It should feel like a reliable digital command center for a commercial roofing operation—no fluff, just data and action.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. KPIs span 1 col, main tables span full width.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700 hover:text-white rounded-sm font-bold shadow-none transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-950 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white rounded-sm font-bold shadow-none transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-zinc-200 text-zinc-950 hover:border-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-50 rounded-sm font-bold transition-all

inputs.style: border-zinc-300 rounded-sm focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-orange-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-1 bg-white

tables.header: border-b-2 border-zinc-950 text-zinc-950 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs pb-3 text-left

login_background.description: High-resolution close-up of an architectural floor plan for the auth screen background. Apply a dark overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure login form readability.

user_avatar.description: Portrait of a male construction worker with a red hard hat, used as the user avatar in the top right of the dashboard.

dashboard_banner.description: Modern commercial building architecture. Can be used for empty states or a welcome banner in the dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) design rules. This means minimal colors, using structural grays and blacks for hierarchy, and saving the primary color (Safety Orange #EA580C) only for vital CTAs and active states.
BANNED FONTS: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Use 'Chivo' for headings and 'Public Sans' for body text. Add these via Google Fonts in index.html.
Do not use generic Shadcn soft shadows. Override Shadcn rounded-md to rounded-sm, and remove box-shadows in favor of crisp 1px borders (border-zinc-200).
The layout must feature a fixed dark sidebar (bg-zinc-950) and a light main content area (bg-zinc-50).
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard KPIs: 4 columns on desktop, tight gap-6, 1px solid borders on KPI cards.
Forms for Contacts, Properties, and Deals should use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout but Shadcn for interactive logic (Select, Datepicker, Input).
For the P&L section within Deals, auto-calculate the Profit based on Proposal Chosen Amount minus (Materials + Labor + Subcontractors + Other Expenses).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='deal-submit-button').
Apply 'tracking-tight' to all Headings, and 'uppercase tracking-[0.1em]' to labels and table headers.
For the login page, use a split-screen design: Left side is the auth form with a white background, right side is the login_background image covered with a black/40 overlay.
